_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=exact-integer witness of same-medium specificity (distortion-correction theorem); return through a DIFFERENT screen leaves the residual qa_mod(-s+phi'-phi). -->
primary_source: (Agarwal & Friberg) scattering theory of distortion correction by phase conjugation; (Zel'dovich, 1985) ISBN 978-3-540-13458-4. Different-medium return (phi'=12 != phi=8) leaves residual, NOT the clean conjugate.
